description: Use this API to return an array of complex values for subsystem buses. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, xarray = afxshntbuscplx(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem buses to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or fixed shunt quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: xarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only in-service fixed shunt buses (type code 1, 2 or 3) with at least one in- service fixed shunt.
for only in-service fixed shunt buses (type code 1, 2 or 3), including those with only out-of-service fixed shunts.
for all in-service buses, including those that are not fixed shunt buses.
for all fixed shunt buses, including those with only out-of-service fixed shunts.
for all buses, including those that are not fixed shunt buses.

string.description: Actual bus voltage, in pu, rectangular coordinates.
Zero sequence total nominal in-service fixed bus shunt, in pu.
Total actual in-service fixed bus shunt (in MW and Mvar).
Total nominal in-service fixed bus shunt at 1.0 pu voltage (in MW and Mvar).
Zero sequence total nominal in-service fixed bus shunt (in MW and Mvar).
Bus mismatch (0.0 if bus type code > 3) (in MW and Mvar).
Total actual in-service fixed bus shunt (units determined by power output options).
Total nominal in-service fixed bus shunt at 1.0 pu voltage (units determined by power output options).
Zero sequence total nominal in-service fixed bus shunt (units determined by power output options).
Bus mismatch (0.0 if bus type code > 3) (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of XARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case; when STRING = ‘PU_GBZERO’, ‘GBZERO’ and ‘O_GBZERO’.
